description: Knuckle-boom crane (Crane1) telemetry from the ship automation system, plus an accelerometer/IMU unit physically mounted on the crane structure.

datasets.sampling: ~1 Hz, 2023-10-31 (full day), downsampled evenly to 2000 points

datasets.signal_group: Wireless IMU / accelerometer strapped to crane boom
datasets.sampling: ~1 Hz mobile-device logging, downsampled evenly to 4563 points (of 4563 total rows)
datasets.note: loggingTime is Unix seconds since 1970 (device clock); location fields are GPS of the phone/sensor unit, not the vessel's primary GNSS.

fields.note: Measurement from a sensor attached to the crane.
